chunks.title: Call to Praise and Declaration of God's Greatness
chunks.reason: The psalm opens with a call to worship followed by theological assertions about God's choice of Israel and His supremacy.

chunks.title: God's Sovereignty in Creation and History
chunks.reason: This section describes God's power over nature and His historical acts of judgment and deliverance for Israel.

chunks.title: Contrast Between Idols and Yahweh
chunks.reason: A logical argument contrasting the lifeless nature of pagan idols with the living God.

chunks.title: Liturgical Benediction and Final Praise
chunks.reason: The psalm concludes with a specific call to various groups of Israel to bless God and a final doxology.
